headline.text: L1 S2 discovered incorrect box labels on *15 pallets* at 05:01 — team reworking at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 cleared 7 issues across S2 and S3, including a gasket leak, wrong gripper parts, and a caramel outage that triggered a caustic clean. S2 found incorrect box labels on 15 pallets at 05:01 and started rework; also flagged a curtain hanging over exposed product. S3 still troubleshooting an MM5 tape machine and MM4 belt contact issue at window close.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 cleared 3 quick faults across ML2 and ML3 — all under 20 minutes. Cross conveyor air fault, cooler fault reset, and a brief mold jam. FFS finished production at 18:30 and began level 4 cleaning. No open issues at window close.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 cleared 10 issues in a busy 24 hours: belt tension, pump alarms, depositor faults, and a safety flag when two support beams came off their hooks on MF Matrix at 00:59. Maintenance re-secured and inspected. At window close, M6 belt still moving with grease at 07:01 and MF Matrix has a bent/clogged funnel piece at 06:52.

resolved.title: S3 tunnel 2 door seal foreign material
resolved.summary: Plastic foreign material found in metal detector; traced to tunnel 2 door seal, part removed and QA approved restart.
resolved.resolution: QA approved restart at 15:15 — "QA has given verbal approval to resume production. We've started the line again" (William Beattie), Nathan Topham identified source as tunnel 2 door seal.

resolved.title: S3 line down, out of caramel
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 23:10 when caramel ran out; waited for C1 and C2 to finish cooking, then ran caustic clean.
resolved.resolution: Line running at 04:07 — Caustic clean completed, reheat on enrober and decorator done at 04:08, "Line is running" (Luis Falcon).

resolved.title: S2 chocolate leak from melting tank to buffer tank
resolved.summary: Pipe leak between melting and buffer tanks; maintenance found and replaced broken gasket.
resolved.resolution: Gasket replaced at 09:02 — "a broken gasket, but it has already been replaced" (S2 Enrober).

resolved.title: S2 MM8 bag slipping at sealer
resolved.summary: Bags slipping on MM8, failing to seal; discovered wrong green pad installed on gripper arm inside spot.
resolved.resolution: Replaced with proper part at 10:14 — "We have replaced the green pad with the proper part" (Troy Baxter).

resolved.title: S3 MM3 wrong cone size installed
resolved.summary: Incorrect cone allowed pieces to fall outside bag into machine, driving high pouch scrap; correct cone installed.
resolved.resolution: Correct cone installed at 16:57 — "With the correct cone, MM3 runs better" (William Beattie), pouch scrap dropped to 87 in the hour after fix.

resolved.title: S3 metal detector blue card sensitivity issue
resolved.summary: Blue test card failing verification at 585-589 while threshold set to 900; Caleb lowered to 580.
resolved.resolution: Setting adjusted at 17:30 — "It was set to 900. I set it to 580, the blue card was only registering at 585-589" (Caleb York).

resolved.title: S3 metal detector belt opening frequently
resolved.summary: Belt kept opening, triggering piston repeatedly; belt had tracked over photoeye, holding it active.
resolved.resolution: Tracking adjusted at 21:31 — "We adjusted tracking and it's doing fine now" (Caleb York), belt moved off photoeye.

resolved.title: ML2 cooler problems
resolved.summary: Cooler fault initially reported as mold jam; maintenance determined it was a fault, reset and running well.
resolved.resolution: Running well at 19:42 — "Maintenance said it was not a jam but a fault that was reset and it's running well now" (Mathew Draper).

resolved.title: ML3 cross conveyor stopped
resolved.summary: Cross belt under ramp stopped running; air fault in HMI, maintenance cleared and restarted.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:22 — Line down 5 minutes, "Maintenance said it was an air fault in the HMI. They cleared the fault and it started running again" (Mathew Draper).

resolved.title: ML2 mold jam
resolved.summary: Mold jam at 00:11; cleared quickly, line running within 3 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Running at 00:14 — "Line is running" (ML2 Depositor).

resolved.title: Two MF Matrix support beams came off hooks
resolved.summary: During start-of-shift inspection, two overhead support beams found off their hooks; immediate safety risk.
resolved.resolution: Re-secured at 06:53 — Maintenance re-secured both beams and completed inspection; Grey Boscan verified all beams properly secured.

resolved.title: Dosing pump and ktron faulted, won't send ingredients
resolved.summary: Both dosing pump and ktron faulted simultaneously, blocking ingredient flow; cleared in 5 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Up and running at 05:36 — "Ktron and dosing pump are up and running" (TruffleLine Enrober).

resolved.title: M5 belt chicanes shut down on error
resolved.summary: Chicanes stopped due to M5 belt tension set too tight; maintenance adjusted and restarted within 13 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Back in operation at 06:42 — "M5 belt tension was too tight it's back in operation now" (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: M6 belt shifting, chocolate spilling off
resolved.summary: Belt tracked too far, causing chocolate to spill; maintenance adjusted tracking and belt ran properly.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted M6 at 09:40 — "Maintenance has already adjusted the M6" (TruffleLine FW).

resolved.title: Truffle Line electrical cabinet open
resolved.summary: Electrical cabinet door left open; immediate safety concern flagged and closed within 10 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 10:54 — "Fixed" (Shawn Jewkes), door panel closed and confirmed.

resolved.title: MF Matrix #14 bracket fell off central cone
resolved.summary: Bracket dropped from central cone; maintenance re-attached within 30 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Reattached at 21:51 — "It's back on" (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: ML1 piston stuck
resolved.summary: Piston jammed, recurring issue; maintenance removed, cleaned, and reinstalled over 5 hours.
resolved.resolution: Installed and lubing at 04:06 — Piston removed at 23:59, cleaned, reassembled, hopper installed at 04:03, chain lubed at 04:06.

resolved.title: Metal found on ML1 belt Y C3
resolved.summary: Staff found metal debris on belt Y C3 during cleaning; belt re-cleaned immediately.
resolved.resolution: Belt cleaned again at 00:02 — "The belt was cleaned again" (Janeth Sanchez).

resolved.title: Riser pump alarm
resolved.summary: Alarm triggered on riser pump; maintenance power-cycled main electrical cabinet to clear.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 04:50 — "Riser pump issues has been fixed" (Raoul Lubain), Kavin power-cycled cabinet.

resolved.title: Guillotine not working
resolved.summary: Guillotine stopped working; maintenance fixed within 12 minutes, method unknown.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 05:04 — "Guillotine is fixed" (TruffleLine Enrober).

needs_attention.title: S2 incorrect box labels on 15 pallets
needs_attention.summary: IMS reconfirmed labels and found Best By and Lot number for scan code on boxes was incorrect; 15 pallets need rework.
needs_attention.status: Label updated, team started rework at 05:29; Jody Howse confirmed working on it at 05:46 at window close.

needs_attention.title: S3 MM4 belts making contact
needs_attention.summary: Two belts for MM4 making contact; maintenance called to reposition them.
needs_attention.status: Caleb York and Jon Jensen called at 21:56 to assist with repositioning; no confirmation of fix at window close.

needs_attention.title: S2 curtain hanging over exposed product
needs_attention.summary: Curtain previously touching floor now folded up and positioned on top of product; hook could fall onto conveyor.
needs_attention.status: Flagged by Angelica Perez at 23:54 and Victor Mejia at 22:58 during GMP inspection; no resolution posted at window close.

needs_attention.title: S3 MM5 tape machine malfunction
needs_attention.summary: Tape machine for MM5 continues to malfunction; recurring issue flagged to maintenance leads.
needs_attention.status: Jon Jensen and Caleb York notified at 18:17; no resolution or update at window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix funnel piece bent and clogged
needs_attention.summary: Piece between shooter and funnel is bent and clogged with product; cannot remove because piece is bent.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 06:52 with photo; no resolution or maintenance response posted at window close.

needs_attention.title: M6 belt moving excessively, grease coming off
needs_attention.summary: M6 belt moving a lot with grease coming off the belt; maintenance working on issue at window close.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance already working on M6 belt as of 07:01; M5 belt adjustments made at 06:58, but M6 issue still active at window close.
